contract: Clean-room release validation cannot start unless manifest.txt, DIRECTORY_TREE.txt, CHECKSUMS.sha256, release evidence and release operation log are present and checksummed.
remaining_gate: T1215 must run the final Markdown/CSV/JSON/GitHub/prototype/PDF/ZIP clean-room verification before A200 can be marked DONE.
rollback: Revert the T1212 preflight evidence and regenerate release artifacts.
